intent: Wide 2-bedroom 5-room layout with NO hallway. Great room (combined living+dining) occupies the front + center, with the standard bedroom tucked at the front-right. Rear band runs left to right: master, common T&B, kitchen. Single T&B. All rooms open directly off the great room.
must_haves: no hallway — every room opens directly off the great room
great room hosts the entry and combines living + dining
rear band: master (left), common T&B (center), kitchen (right)
standard bedroom at the front-right, under the kitchen
